news.title:
RailTel Corp secures a Rs. 23.2 Cr work order from Goa Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.
Order involves developing an exclusive online portal, to be executed by June 8, 2026.
news.summary:
RailTel Corp secures a Rs. 23.2 Cr work order from Goa Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.
Order involves developing an exclusive online portal, to be executed by June 8, 2026.

news.title:
Praruh Technologies secures ₹38.98 crore deal from RailTel for MDWDM network modernization.
The project involves using Nokia equipment to upgrade RailTel's optical network.
news.summary:
Praruh Technologies secures ₹38.98 crore deal from RailTel for MDWDM network modernization.

news.title:
RailTel received LoA from MGIMS for HIMS and campus systems deployment.
The project includes customization, integration, and implementation by 31 Mar 2032.
news.summary:
RailTel received LoA from MGIMS for HIMS and campus systems deployment.
The project includes customization, integration, and implementation by 31 Mar 2032.

news.title:
RailTel Corp secures ₹12.85 crore order from MGIMS for HIMS systems.
This deal supports RailTel's expansion in healthcare IT infrastructure services.
news.summary:
RailTel Corp secures ₹12.85 crore order from MGIMS for HIMS systems.

news.title:
RailTel Corp receives letter of acceptance for a 128.5 mln INR order.
The order is from Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences.
news.summary:
RailTel Corp receives letter of acceptance for a 128.5 mln INR order.
The order is from Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences.

news.title:
RailTel wins ₹29.7 Cr Jharkhand govt order to set up English labs by 2029.
RailTel shares closed at ₹245.95, near 52-week low; market cap at ₹7,893 Cr.
news.summary:
RailTel wins ₹29.7 Cr Jharkhand govt order to set up English labs by 2029.
RailTel shares closed at ₹245.95, near 52-week low; market cap at ₹7,893 Cr.

news.title:
Railtel Corp secures ₹13.04 Cr deal with Mumbai Port Authority for HMIS SITC.
The 5-year contract includes execution until July 2026 and O&M services.
news.summary:

news.title:

The project spans 5 years from the Go-Live date for hospitals and dispensaries.
news.summary:

news.title:

The contract involves system integration for KSWAN 3.0, to be executed by March 2031.
news.summary:

news.title:
RailTel to hold an Investor Meet in Mumbai on March 30, 2026, sharing its investor presentation.
No unpublished price-sensitive information to be disclosed; presentation available on RailTel's website.
news.summary:

news.title:
RailTel wins ₹29.48 crore SD-WAN contract from MP State Crime Records Bureau, to be executed by March 2029.
RailTel also secured a ₹42.63 crore NICSI contract under NKN project, to be completed by March 2027.
news.summary:
